_publications._publicationTitle: Patient-reported measures of tinnitus for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 2-related schwannomatosis: Recommendations for clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: Overall group rating = 2.73...validated to assess both intake assessments, as well as treatment-related changes in tinnitus
details: Overall group rating = 2.73 on PRO-RATE criteria; validated for both intake assessments and treatment-related changes in tinnitus
